auth.password_requirements: Use at least {{min}} characters with uppercase, lowercase, number, and symbol.

login.title: Login
login.subtitle: Manage all your home inventory smartly
login.terms_beta: BETA Version: HomeInventory is currently in testing phase. No guarantee is given regarding the persistence or security of your data.
login.terms_disclaimer: Disclaimer: By using this application, you agree that you cannot claim any compensation for potential data loss, access issues, or other technical malfunctions.
login.terms_backup: Data Backup: We strongly recommend backing up your important information regularly.
login.terms_accept: By logging in, you are deemed to have accepted these terms.

register.title: Welcome to HomeInventory
register.subtitle: Create a new account or join an existing house
register.create_house_desc: 🏠 A new house will be created and you'll get a unique House Key. Share this key with family to access the same inventory.
register.join_house_desc: 👨‍👩‍👧‍👦 Enter the House Key shared with you to join an existing house. Your request will be sent to the house owner for approval.
register.password_placeholder: At least 10 chars, uppercase, lowercase, number, symbol
register.password_length: Password must be at least 6 characters
register.key_required: House Key is required to join an existing house

key_created.title: 🎉 House Created!
key_created.subtitle: Save the key below in a safe place
key_created.warning: Important: This key will only be shown once. Share it with family members so they can access the same inventory.

email_verification.title: 📧 Email Verification Required
email_verification.message: Account created! Please verify your email address to login.
email_verification.step_1: We sent a verification email to <1>{{email}}</1>.
email_verification.step_2: Click the <1>"Verify My Account"</1> button in the email.
email_verification.spam_note: Check spam/junk folder if email doesn't arrive.
email_verification.key_note: Important: Your house key was also sent in the email. You can share it with family members.

forgot_password.title: Forgot Password
forgot_password.subtitle: Start a secure recovery flow to access your account again.
forgot_password.email_success: If an account exists, a password reset link valid for 15 minutes has been sent.
forgot_password.recovery_mode_info: Email is disabled on this server. Continue with the Recovery Key you saved during account setup.
forgot_password.new_password_placeholder: At least 10 chars, uppercase, lowercase, number, symbol

reset_password.title: Reset Password
reset_password.subtitle: Use the secure link to set a new password.
reset_password.missing_token: The password reset link looks incomplete or broken.
reset_password.new_password_placeholder: At least 10 chars, uppercase, lowercase, number, symbol

recovery_setup.title: Create Recovery Key
recovery_setup.subtitle: Until this is completed, your account is not considered safe for local password recovery.
recovery_setup.warning: This key will only be shown once. Save it in a password manager or another secure offline location.
recovery_setup.account: A recovery key will be created for account {{username}}.
recovery_setup.description: Because email is disabled, you will only be able to reset your password with this key in the future.

recovery_key_modal.subtitle: This key is shown only once.
recovery_key_modal.warning: If you lose this key while email is disabled, you may not be able to recover your password. Copy it and store it safely.

beta_banner.title: BETA:
beta_banner.text: HomeInventory is currently in testing and hobby phase. No guarantee is given for data persistence or security. Please keep backups of important information.

form.name: Item Name
form.location_help: Where in the room? (e.g. 'Top shelf of blue cabinet')
form.location_empty: No location defined in this room yet. Start typing to create one.
form.invoice_section_help: Tọju aworan invoice, idiyele, ati titele atilẹyin ọja nibi lailewu.
form.invoice_section_collapsed: Ṣí ìpín yìí tí o bá fẹ́ ṣàfikún àwòrán ìsanwó kan, ìdíyelé, àti ọjọ́ àtìlẹ́yìn àtìlẹ́yìn.
form.invoice_security: Awọn alaye ti o wa ni apakan yii ati aworan isanwo ti wa ni paroko nigbati o ba fipamọ.
form.warranty_calculation_help: Tí o bá fi ọjọ́ ìbẹ̀rẹ̀ àtòlẹ́yìn sílẹ̀ sílẹ̀, ọjọ́ ìdíyelé náà ni wọ́n ń lo. Nigbati o ba tẹ akoko naa, ọjọ ipari atilẹyin ọja ni a ṣe iṣiro laifọwọyi.

qrcode.title: QR Code
qrcode.desc: You can print and stick this QR code on the item. Scanning it redirects directly to this page.

messages.quick_add_success: ✓ "{{barcode}}" quick added - you can edit later
messages.not_found: ⚠ Product not found in databases. You can search on Google.

messages.house_leave_confirm: Are you sure you want to leave "{{name}}"?
messages.connection_error: Could not connect to server. Check your internet connection.
messages.username_len_error: Username must be at least 3 characters
messages.password_min_len: New password must be at least 6 characters
messages.member_kick_confirm: Are you sure you want to remove "{{name}}" from the house?
messages.member_kick_error: Could not remove member from the house

my_houses.title: My Houses
my_houses.no_house: You are not a member of any house yet
my_houses.info: 💡 You can be a member of multiple houses and switch between them. Each house maintains a separate inventory.

house_info.title: Active House Key
house_info.share_info: 💡 Users you share this key with can access your inventory by using the "Join House" option during registration.
house_info.invite_desc: Share your house key to let family members access the same inventory. Each member logs in with their own account but accesses the same data.

security.title: Security
security.recovery_key_desc: You can generate a new key for local password recovery.
security.recovery_key_missing: No recovery key is visible for this account yet.
security.recovery_key_unavailable: The current recovery key cannot be displayed. Regenerate it if needed.
security.recovery_key_modal_desc: Confirm your current password to continue. The new key will be shown only once.

join_house.title: Join House
join_house.key_help: Enter the key you received from your family member. The request will wait for owner approval.

create_house.title: Create New House
create_house.name_help: If left empty, will be named "My New House"
create_house.info: ℹ️ Default categories and rooms will be created for the new house. You can edit them later.

username.title: Change Username
username.help: 3-30 characters, letters, numbers, underscore and dash only

inventory.title: Inventory
inventory.subtitle: {{count}} items found
inventory.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this item?

categories.title: Categories
categories.subtitle: {{count}} categories
categories.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this category?

rooms.title: Rooms
rooms.subtitle: {{count}} rooms
rooms.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this room?

users.confirm_ban: Are you sure you want to {{status}} this user?
users.confirm_delete_1: Are you sure you want to delete user "{{username}}"?
users.confirm_delete_2: ⚠️ WARNING: This will PERMANENTLY delete ALL data (inventories, rooms, categories) for user "{{username}}"!
users.confirm_delete_3: 🚨 FINAL WARNING: Account "{{username}}" and all data will be IRREVERSIBLY deleted. Do you want to continue?

hero.description: Digitize your home inventory with support for 100 languages. Categorize items, invite family, and protect sensitive fields with modern encryption.

features.title: Why <1>HomeInventory</1>?
features.subtitle: Home management, multilingual access, and encryption for sensitive data in one platform

categorize.title: Categorize Items
categorize.desc: Organize all items by room and category, find what you need in seconds.

family.title: Invite Family with House Key
family.desc: Invite family members with your unique house key, manage inventory together.

access.title: Access from Anywhere
access.desc: At home, at work, or on vacation - access your inventory from any device and in your own language.

barcode.title: Quick Add with Barcode
barcode.desc: Scan product barcodes, details are filled automatically.

security.title: Field-Level Security
security.desc: Sensitive inventory fields and verification data are protected with AES-256-GCM field encryption.

backup.title: Backup & Export
backup.desc: Backup your inventory in JSON format, restore whenever you want.

cta_bottom.title: Start Using Now!
cta_bottom.description: Create a free account and digitize your home inventory. Registration takes only a few seconds.

footer.desc: A multilingual and security-focused platform for digitizing your home inventory.

landing.preview_privacy_notice: Demo view: no real user data is displayed.

inventory.title: Inventory
inventory.content: Here you can add and list your items. Track all home items in one place!

house_key.title: House Key
house_key.content: This is your house key, use it to invite others. Add family members to your house!

categories.title: Categories
categories.content: Organize by categorizing your items. Electronics, furniture, kitchen, and more!

google_house_select.title: Welcome!
google_house_select.subtitle: You logged in with Google. Now select a house.
google_house_select.welcome_options: What would you like to do?

join.title: Join Existing House
join.desc: Send a request to join a family member's house

google_house_select.house_name_hint: If left empty, it will be named "My Home"
google_house_select.house_key_hint: Enter the 64-character key received from a family member

pending.title: Waiting for house owner approval
pending.description: Your request for "{{house}}" is still waiting for a decision.

no_house.title: You are not connected to a house right now
no_house.description: Create a new house or send a join request to an existing one.

create.title: Create a New House
create.description: Start your own home inventory and continue right away.
create.name_placeholder: e.g. My Home, Summer House, Storage

join.title: Send a Join Request
join.description: Enter a house key and send the request directly to the house owner.

scanner.title: Barcode Scanner
scanner.permission_error: Camera permission denied. Check browser settings.
scanner.found_local_msg: This barcode is already in your inventory.
scanner.not_found_db: This barcode was not found in databases.
scanner.zoom_hint: 💡 Increase zoom for clarity and hold phone steady
scanner.invalid_qr: This QR code is not for this app.
scanner.not_found: Product not found. Try a different barcode.

item_qr.hint_mobile: 📱 Scan this QR code with your phone to access the item quickly
item_qr.usage_desc: Print the QR code and stick it on the item. Scan with your phone to access this page instantly!

verification.subject: 🏠 HomeInventory - 📧 Email Verification Required
verification.headerSubtitle: Create a new account or join an existing house
verification.intro: Account created! Please verify your email address to login.
verification.warningBody: Check spam/junk folder if email doesn't arrive.
verification.houseKeyNote: Important: Your house key was also sent in the email. You can share it with family members.
features: 💡 You can be a member of multiple houses and switch between them. Each house maintains a separate inventory.
verification.fallback: The password reset link looks incomplete or broken.

welcome.subject: Welcome to HomeInventory
welcome.headerSubtitle: Create a new account or join an existing house
welcome.houseKeyNote: This is your house key, use it to invite others. Add family members to your house!
features: 💡 You can be a member of multiple houses and switch between them. Each house maintains a separate inventory.

houseJoinDecision.bodyLine2: Your request for "{{house}}" is still waiting for a decision.

houseKick.subject: Member removed from the house
houseKick.bodyLine1Template: Are you sure you want to remove "{{name}}" from the house?
houseKick.bodyLine2: Create a new house or send a join request to an existing one.

passwordReset.subject: 🔐 Reset Password
passwordReset.intro: Start a secure recovery flow to access your account again.
passwordReset.warningBody: If an account exists, a password reset link valid for 15 minutes has been sent.
passwordReset.fallback: The password reset link looks incomplete or broken.

vault.title: Personal Vault
vault.subtitle: Agbegbe ti ara ẹni ti o ti wa ni decrypted nikan ninu ẹrọ lilọ kiri ayelujara ati pe ko le ka nipasẹ olupin bi plaintext.
vault.setup_description: Bọtini Vault ti wa ni ipilẹṣẹ ninu ẹrọ aṣawakiri. Olupin naa tọju awọn bọtini ti a we nikan ati awọn igbasilẹ ti paroko.
vault.setup_warning: Tí o bá pàdánù gbólóhùn ìwọlé ìgbàmọ́ àti kọ́kọ́rọ́ ìgbàpadà, a kò lè dá dátà náà padà.
vault.passphrase_placeholder: Yan ọrọ iwọle ti o lagbara pẹlu o kere ju awọn ohun kikọ 12
vault.protection_item_1: Orukọ ohun kan, apejuwe, kooduopo barcode, idiyele, ọjọ, ati awọn aaye atilẹyin ọja ti wa ni paroko ninu ẹrọ aṣawakiri.
vault.protection_item_2: Olupin naa rii apoowe ti paroko nikan, kika awọn nkan, ati awọn akoko.
vault.protection_item_3: Itusilẹ akọkọ jẹ ti ara ẹni ati idojukọ ọrọ; pinpin ati media nilo ṣiṣan aabo ti o yatọ.
vault.unlock_description: O lè ṣí ibi ìgbàmọ́ náà pẹ̀lú gbólóhùn ìwọlé rẹ tàbí bọ́tìnì ìgbàpadà tí o ti fipamọ́ tẹ́lẹ̀.
vault.unlock_passphrase_placeholder: tẹ gbólóhùn ìwọlé ibi ìgbàgbọ́ rẹ
vault.security_note_1: Bọ́tìnì ibi ìpamọ́ náà ń gbé nínú ìrántí aṣàwákiri nìkan. Ó máa ń yọ́ nígbà tí o bá kúrò ní ojú ewé náà tàbí tí o bá tì ibi ìpamọ́ náà.
vault.security_note_2: Ti o ba gbagbe ọrọ iwọle naa, o le lo bọtini imularada. Ti awọn mejeeji ba sọnu, akoonu naa di alailẹgbẹ patapata.
vault.recovery_ready_description: Ẹ̀ẹ̀kan ṣoṣo a fi kọ́kọ́rọ́ yìí hàn. Fi pamọ ni ibikan ti o ni ailewu.
vault.recovery_visible_once: Kọ́kọ́rọ́ yìí kò ní ṣàfihàn lẹ́ẹ̀kan sí i nígbà mìíràn.
vault.record_form_subtitle: Eyi tẹle ṣiṣan ohun deede ni pẹkipẹki, ṣugbọn plaintext ṣi ko fi ẹrọ aṣawakiri silẹ.
vault.barcode_privacy_hint: awọn kooduopo Vault ko wa lori awọn iṣẹ ita laifọwọyi; ọrọ kooduopo ti wa ni fipamọ nikan bi data ti paroko.
vault.media_note: Awọn fọto, ọlọjẹ kooduopo ati wiwa ọja ita ti wa ni alaabo ni ṣiṣan ibi ipamọ akọkọ yii. Wọn nilo media ti paroko lọtọ ati opo gigun ti aṣiri.
vault.empty_description: Bẹrẹ nipa fifi igbasilẹ ibi ipamọ akọkọ rẹ kun.
vault.empty_filter_title: Kò sí àkọsílẹ̀ tí ó bá àlẹ̀mọ tí ó wà lọ́wọ́lọ́wọ́
vault.empty_filter_description: Gbìyànjú ìwádìí mìíràn tàbí ṣàtúnṣe àlẹ̀mọ̀ náà.
vault.delete_confirm: Ṣé ó dá ọ lójú pé o fẹ́ pa àkọsílẹ̀ ibi ìpamọ́ yìí rẹ́?

messages.passphrase_mismatch: Vault ìwọlé kò bá ara wọn mu.
messages.setup_failed: A ko le ṣẹda ibi ipamọ ti ara ẹni.
messages.unlock_failed: A ko le ṣii ibi ipamọ naa. Ṣayẹwo alaye ti o wọle.
messages.save_failed: A ko le fipamọ igbasilẹ ibi ipamọ.
messages.delete_failed: A kò lè parẹ́ àkọsílẹ̀ ibi ìpamọ́ náà.
messages.decrypt_failed: A kò lè pa àkóónú ibi ìpamọ́ náà mọ́.
messages.name_required: Orukọ ohun kan ni a nilo fun igbasilẹ ifipamọ.
messages.options_failed: Ẹ̀ka àti yàrá àṣàyàn kò lè kórò.

vault.recovery_file_warning: Tí o bá pàdánù kọ́kọ́rọ́ yìí àti gbólóhùn ìwọlé ibi ìgbà, a kò lè gba ààyè náà padà.
